nodes.label: Max Pressure Reward Mode
nodes.rationale: Formulated as -|queue_in - queue_out| / n. Literature standard that keeps DQN loss stable (~0.5) compared to differential reward.

nodes.label: Combined Reward Mode (Negative)
nodes.rationale: Combined arrived and wait delta (alpha * arrived - beta * delta_wait). Over-weighted throughput and regressed badly; documented negative result.

nodes.label: Differential Reward Mode
nodes.rationale: Delta wait minus switch penalty. Original reward format, but can suffer from high loss variance (28-130).

nodes.label: Anti-Starve Reward Mode
nodes.rationale: Differential reward minus starve penalty times max lane wait.

nodes.label: Signal Control Baselines
nodes.rationale: Evaluation includes fixed (round-robin), actuated (greedy max-wait with min-green hysteresis), and native_actuated (SUMO's built-in logic).
